description: Solitaire Associations: Words is a unique puzzle game combining classic solitaire mechanics with word association challenges. Players begin with a partially filled board and draw one card at a time from a deck, strategically placing "word cards" onto "category cards" to form complete category stacks. A category stack is built by first placing a category card, then adding all related word cards to it. The user interface displays the board, the draw deck, and a move counter, with interaction primarily involving tapping and dragging cards to their designated spots. Progression occurs across hundreds of levels, each increasing in complexity through more intricate word associations and stricter move limits. The objective is to sort every word card into its correct category stack, winning by clearing the level within the limited number of moves, or losing if moves run out.
